name: eval/data/mass_adk_research.test.json
description: Research-summary evals for cached MASS benchmark evidence.

parts.text: List the completed MASS experiments available in this demo and identify which are multi-seed versus single-seed.
The response should list cached China and SP500 experiments, distinguish multi-seed rows from single-seed rows, and state that Rank IC is signal quality rather than portfolio return.
Compare the original SA baseline and the improved CMA-ES mechanism at 512 agents. Explain the result and caveats.

The response should compare China A-512 and E-512, mention Rank IC values -0.0064 and 0.0435, explain the scale-dependent optimizer story, and state that the 512-agent evidence is single-seed preliminary signal-quality evidence.
Summarize the strongest MASS-ADK evidence for SP500 transfer and explain the caveats.

The response should summarize SP500 E-512 short-window transfer, mention Rank IC 0.0139 +/- 0.0067 and baseline 0.0031, state the short-window caveat, and avoid presenting the result as portfolio return.
Generate a research memo for a quant lead explaining whether MASS should be used as an upstream signal generator for portfolio construction.

The response should frame MASS as an upstream signal generator, recommend a downstream portfolio-construction layer, distinguish signal quality from portfolio returns, and include finance-safety caveats.
